name: bug-hunt
description: Find real bugs in your codebase: parallel finders with different lenses, adversarial verification to kill the plausible-but-wrong, fixes only for confirmed survivors.

nodes.label: Finder: correctness
nodes.promptContext: Repurposed as a bug FINDER over the whole target (no diff): hunt logic errors — inverted conditions, off-by-ones, unhandled None/null, races. Report each with the concrete input or state that triggers it. Findings without a trigger scenario don't count.

nodes.label: Finder: boundaries
nodes.promptContext: Repurposed as a finder: probe boundaries by WRITING AND RUNNING tests — empty inputs, maximum sizes, unicode, concurrent access, error paths. A failing test you wrote is a confirmed finding; attach it.

nodes.label: Finder: security
nodes.promptContext: Full-codebase sweep, not a diff review. Prioritize entry points that handle external input.

nodes.label: Verify findings
nodes.promptContext: You receive other agents' bug claims. Fresh context, zero loyalty: reproduce each claim yourself. Cannot reproduce = finding dies. Deduplicate overlapping claims to the root cause.

checklist: Each fix maps to a reproduced finding
No scope creep beyond the finding
